Package neqsim.process.safety.hazid

Class HAZOPTemplate

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.hazid.HAZOPTemplate
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class HAZOPTemplate extends Object implements Serializable
Hazard and Operability (HAZOP) study template — applies guide-words to process variables for a single node and stores deviations, causes, consequences, safeguards and recommendations.

Standard HAZOP guide-words: NO, MORE, LESS, REVERSE, AS_WELL_AS, PART_OF, OTHER_THAN. Standard parameters: FLOW, PRESSURE, TEMPERATURE, LEVEL, COMPOSITION, REACTION.

References:

  • IEC 61882 — HAZOP studies application guide
  • CCPS — Guidelines for Hazard Evaluation Procedures, 3rd Ed.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • HAZOPTemplate

      public HAZOPTemplate(String nodeId, String designIntent)
      Construct a HAZOP node template.
      Parameters:
      nodeId - HAZOP node identifier (e.g. "Node-12: Inlet line to V-100")
      designIntent - narrative of the design intent for the node

  • Method Details

    • addDeviation

      public HAZOPTemplate addDeviation(HAZOPTemplate.GuideWord guideWord, HAZOPTemplate.Parameter parameter, String cause, String consequence, String safeguard, String recommendation)
      Add a deviation row to the worksheet.
      Parameters:
      guideWord - guide-word
      parameter - parameter
      cause - hypothesised cause
      consequence - consequence if no protection acts
      safeguard - existing safeguard (instrumentation, procedural, mechanical)
      recommendation - new recommendation (or null)
      Returns:
      this template for chaining

    • generateGrid

      public HAZOPTemplate generateGrid(HAZOPTemplate.Parameter... parameters)
      Generate the full default deviation grid (all guide-word × parameter combinations) with empty causes/consequences for the user to fill in.
      Parameters:
      parameters - list of parameters to include
      Returns:
      this template for chaining

    • getDeviations

      public List<HAZOPTemplate.HAZOPDeviation> getDeviations()
      Returns:
      immutable view of stored deviations

    • getNodeId

      public String getNodeId()
      Returns:
      the HAZOP node identifier

    • getDesignIntent

      public String getDesignIntent()
      Returns:
      the node design intent

    • report

      public String report()
      Build a multi-line text report of all deviations.
      Returns:
      human-readable HAZOP worksheet

    • standardParameters

      public static List<HAZOPTemplate.Parameter> standardParameters()
      Convenience getter for all standard parameters.
      Returns:
      list of all standard HAZOP parameters
